prompt: A man sits quietly on a chair in an empty studio. His upper body gradually dissolves into glowing ash and drifting embers, while his lower body remains solid. The particles float upward like fading memories, illuminated by soft cinematic light. Outfit: Black turtleneck, loose gray trousers. Lighting: Low-key cinematic lighting with warm ember glow. Background: Empty dark studio with subtle haze. Typography: * Top: “BURNT OUT” * Small text: “RUNNING EMPTY” * Large airy text: “FADE” Mood: Exhaustion, emotional depletion, quiet surrender.
promptEn: A man sits quietly on a chair in an empty studio. His upper body gradually dissolves into glowing ash and drifting embers, while his lower body remains solid. The particles float upward like fading memories, illuminated by soft cinematic light. Outfit: Black turtleneck, loose gray trousers. Lighting: Low-key cinematic lighting with warm ember glow. Background: Empty dark studio with subtle haze. Typography: * Top: “BURNT OUT” * Small text: “RUNNING EMPTY” * Large airy text: “FADE” Mood: Exhaustion, emotional depletion, quiet surrender.
promptZh: 一名男子安静地坐在空荡摄影棚的椅子上。他的上半身逐渐消散为发光的 灰烬与漂浮的余火，而下半身保持实体。粒子如同消逝的记忆般向上飘浮，被 柔和的电影感 灯光照亮。服装：黑色高领毛衣，宽松灰色长裤。灯光：低调的电影感布光，带有温暖的余火光芒。背景：空荡的黑暗摄影棚，带有轻微的薄雾。排版：* 顶部：“BURNT OUT” * 小字：“RUNNING EMPTY” * 大号空灵字体：“FADE” 氛围：疲惫、情感枯竭、安静的臣服。
